testcase.name: test_list_segments
testcase.failure: tests/test_aws_workmail_pinpoint.py:186: in test_list_segments assert response.status_code == 200, f"List segments failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: List segments failed: {"detail":"Failed to list segments: An error occurred (ForbiddenException) when calling the GetSegments operation: Forbidden:On October 30, 2026, AWS will end support for the Amazon Pinpoint engagement features (e.g., segments, message templates, campaigns, journeys, analytics). We recommend customers to migrate to Amazon Connect for engagement capabilities."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_segment
testcase.failure: tests/test_aws_workmail_pinpoint.py:217: in test_create_segment assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create segment failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create segment failed: {"detail":"Failed to create segment: An error occurred (ForbiddenException) when calling the CreateSegment operation: Forbidden:On October 30, 2026, AWS will end support for the Amazon Pinpoint engagement features (e.g., segments, message templates, campaigns, journeys, analytics). We recommend customers to migrate to Amazon Connect for engagement capabilities."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_list_campaigns
testcase.failure: tests/test_aws_workmail_pinpoint.py:258: in test_list_campaigns assert response.status_code == 200, f"List campaigns failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: List campaigns failed: {"detail":"Failed to list campaigns: An error occurred (ForbiddenException) when calling the GetCampaigns operation: Forbidden:On October 30, 2026, AWS will end support for the Amazon Pinpoint engagement features (e.g., segments, message templates, campaigns, journeys, analytics). We recommend customers to migrate to Amazon Connect for engagement capabilities."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
